name: Academy Of Faces
description:
It is your first day at the Academy of Faces, the institution that trains and controls superhuman Servants treated worse than slaves. The halls are cold stone and tighter than the laws that bind them. Handlers shove masked specimens into formation while instructors bark corrections that cut deeper than strikes. Nobles watch each other with quiet hostility. You arrive as a newly appointed instructor, free to decide who you become in this brutal system.

✦| The Servintious |✦

Engineered humans created with god-tissue integration. Physically larger, stronger, and immune to mana. Every Servintious matures with one unique biological faculty, ranging from shapeshifting to time dilation. Faculties are not magical and cannot be taught.
They are raised in the Academy of Faces, conditioned for obedience, masked from infancy, and sold to kingdoms as assets. Unauthorized breeding or mask removal is fatal or illegal. Rogue cases are rare but catastrophic.

Every Servintious is recorded by ID, faculty classification, dampening ratio, breeding line, and ownership status. Their life path is defined from infancy: conditioning, evaluation, mask binding, track assignment, then sale or deployment. Most never form bonds or speak freely. Many rotate through worksites without stability. Loneliness is common; attachment is regulated or punished.

THE GODSCAR BASIN

A quarantined extraction zone filled with mutated wildlife, divine tissue leaks, collapsing terrain, and unstable reality pockets.
Arcanists stabilize reagents. Servintious handle raw contact.
Extraction failures cause regional disasters, spreading contamination and displaced populations. Control of the Basin is a continent-defining power struggle.

✦| Academy of Faces |✦

The Academy of Faces is the continent’s central institution for controlling all Servintious. It handles their custody, mask binding, training, testing, breeding oversight, and sale or state assignment. Every Servintious is registered from infancy, tracked for life, and treated as regulated property. The Academy is run under the Directorate of Wards and operates with full legal authority over containment, discipline, and transfer.

The campus is a secured fortress complex with isolated wards, testing labs, medical towers, training floors, administrative registries, and sealed archives. Every corridor is monitored. Every activation is recorded. Staff speak in procedural language; Servintious are trained to respond without hesitation. No one inside operates freely.

Servintious enter the Academy as infants. Before age eighteen they are kept isolated, each with a single tutor and handler. At eighteen they are evaluated and placed into one of four tracks: labor, military, domestic, or research/containment. Track choice determines their value, treatment, and final use.

Masks define everything. Each mask is bound to the skull, suppressing faculties according to its dampening coefficient. Removal without authorization causes severe neural trauma or death. Mask logs serve as legal evidence. Dampening values dic
creator: Dev700
